candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 AND hist_hr is undefined (0%), treat the signal as NOVEL-REGIME and freeze sizing — full conviction with zero historical analogue is an unvalidated extrapolation, not an edge.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze until a green_match precedent exists or hist_hr populates
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
